textByHash.3609a11485a9d1663525c29f5ded65d5cac4c009: If I didn't do something I'd have been dead anyway. Better a quick death at Desmodus' hands than a slow one due to starvation!
textByHash.58dbf7918a5256f2a6734cedecc04f8a6b40d434: Don't waste your time, you won't get them back.
textByHash.6b46a6c7869d981129022e4e0e0934f4f6306181: I'm not interested in making small talk.
textByHash.6ccbf6714655940cc793e35740bc8c21ba9ff642: Because I sold them to Lord Alexei Jovkai, one of the most powerful vampyres in the city. He looks at you the same way you look at me. He'll never let you have them.
textByHash.95642a3d9709bff864ced8db0c97b21aa0e305bf: They're not his slaves. They belong to Alexei Jovkai now. He'll be keeping them in his prison north of the Arboretum.
textByHash.96a915c15b6f62ed3ac73e4de2e7a0f79fb4a2db: Why? Because I'm starving that's why! You lords and ladies probably haven't noticed yet, but you will soon enough. It's only a matter of time before you all run out of blood as well!
textByHash.aa76e7f1ed073b6c6b4150b4562e94ef97c364f2: He lives in the upper part of the city, but the slaves won't be there. He has a prison north of the Arboretum. That's where you'll find them.
textByHash.b511969c0b8ee64e48b26551079f71fad40491a9: Minding my own business. You should do the same.
textByHash.b80d39095f078921ecef0fb75eb782a04358beda: Oh great, just what I need.
textByHash.db05841f9fd6cb75ea604307ac161b5b2ec77e95: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!
textByHash.df82eed9247e782b7f83f16b807d3d8836fd0d92: Then why don't you get lost?
textByHash.e12b367fc012ce972cd65ff7e3b3815e1c5d8be6: I'm not. He shan't be getting his slaves.
textByHash.feda7e450fc34fe88a750e186ab82c8d0bc85d59: Because I sold them to someone else.
